releaseNotes: Product tiles now follow a clearer cashier layout: bold name, price, SKU, and stock indicator.
Left cashier sidebar can collapse to create more product-grid space.
Manual update checks now confirm when this terminal is already on the latest version.
Current invoice sync status now uses a compact indicator instead of reconnecting text.
Cashier product cards redesigned into compact three-line POS tiles with SKU, price, stock count, and colored stock status.
Category filters now use consistent accent colors for faster product navigation.
Cashier product cards now use compact icons instead of large product photos.
Product cards now remain readable on 1366x768 laptop displays with Windows taskbars.
Activation and login screens now resize correctly across Windows DPI settings and taskbar sizes.
Cashier workstation panels now use adaptive sizing for 1366x768 through large desktop displays.
Windows app now launches without opening a command prompt window.
Responsive desktop window sizing for different Windows displays and DPI settings.
Visible in-app update check from the cashier dashboard.
Near real-time sync notifications for invoices, inventory, expenses, branches, and employee changes.
Automatic desktop refresh after cloud updates with reconnecting live update support.
In-app update notifications using the VisionPOS downloads manifest.
Secure first-run terminal activation with admin-generated codes.
Cashier-only desktop interface connected to the VisionPOS cloud backend.
USB barcode scanner workflow with persistent search focus.
Receipt printing support through installed Windows printers.
Designed for approved shop terminals only; downloading the app alone does not grant access.
